title: CJI Surya Kant bats for institutionalising engagement of retired judges as arbitrators, law teachers
description: Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant on Saturday called for a structured national registry of retired judges willing to oversee alternative dispute resolution (ADR) processes and serve in other post-retirement roles including legal education and awareness initiatives. He outlined four specific roles for former judges in this framework: as mediators and arbitrators in commercial and family matters, as legal educators in schools, colleges, and Gram Panchayats to explain legal rights in plain la
